description_long: This is a medium-sized cardboard parcel box with a slightly worn and dirty exterior, suggesting it has been handled or transported. The box features a brown packing tape strip running across the top, securing the flaps. On one side, there are two black upward-pointing arrows and faint paw prints, indicating the correct upright orientation and possibly a pet-related shipment. Another side displays a barcode and a graphic of a can with a fish, reinforcing the pet food theme, along with more paw prints. The remaining sides are plain except for additional paw prints and the continuation of the tape. The box appears sturdy and is likely used for shipping or storing pet food products.
description: A worn cardboard parcel box with brown tape, pet food graphics, and paw prints, suggesting it contains pet-related goods.
description_view_0: This view shows the front of the box with two black upward arrows and faint paw prints, along with the brown tape on top.
description_view_1: This side features a barcode, a can with a fish graphic, and several paw prints, indicating pet food contents.
description_view_2: This view displays a plain side with only the brown tape on top and a single set of paw prints.
description_view_3: This side shows another can with a fish graphic and faint paw prints, similar to view 1 but without the barcode.
